method: Research on 2026-07-12. Direct HTTP fetches of campsite websites are blocked by this session's network egress policy, so all facts were taken from search-indexed pages of the campsites' own official domains (domain-restricted queries). Third-party directories, booking platforms and review sites were NOT used as confirmation. Confidence is capped accordingly; 'high' is only used where several official pages and verbatim official documents agree.

records.address: Via Aurelia km 469, 16039 Sestri Levante (GE), Italy

touringPitchEvidence.summary: Official site has a pitch rates page ('Tariffe') and the official brochure (depliant.pdf) covers pitches; site also advertises camper service. Exact pitch wording could not be read directly (fetch blocked), so evidence is indirect.

corrections: Coordinates corrected from 44.2908,9.4147 (Sestri Levante town centre) to 44.2639,9.4419 — official brochure GPS 'N44°15'50" E9°26'31"'; campsite is in the hills near Riva Trigoso, ~5 km from town, 1.5 km from the sea.
records.notes: Recorded phone and email match the official brochure exactly ('Tel. +39 018544348', 'info@campingmaremonti.com'). Mobile +39 347 8901199 also published. Note: campsite is NOT at the beach — hillside location, 1.5 km from the sea. Verified via search-indexed official-domain pages; direct fetch blocked by sandbox network policy.

touringPitchEvidence.summary: Official site sells camping pitches of 80–100 m² explicitly for tents and camping-cars (classic, comfort+, premium categories), plus a motorhome dump station.
touringPitchEvidence.quote: Emplacement Camping à Fréjus Classique : Tente ou Camping-car

policies.minimumStay: Rentals: 7-night minimum on some July 2026 offers; no minimum published for touring pitches on accessible pages.
policies.receptionHours: Pitch arrivals 14:00–19:00 per FAQ; full reception hours not readable.

corrections: Email corrected from contact@campinglapierreverte.com to com@campinglapierreverte.com (address published on the official site).
records.notes: Phone matches record. FAQ: 1 parking space included at rentals, 2nd space paid supplement — rule for pitches not published. Late arrivals (rentals) handled by night security until midnight. 'Dernière minute' booking page exists. Inland location (~7 km from beaches). Verified via search-indexed official-domain pages; direct fetch blocked by sandbox network policy.

records.officialName: Camping Les Restanques (Camping Gorges du Verdon)

touringPitchEvidence.summary: Official site offers touring pitches, e.g. 'Emplacement Eco' of ~80 m² (some with 10A electricity), and describes pitches for tents, caravans, vans and motorhomes.
touringPitchEvidence.quote: spacious pitches for tents, caravans, vans and motorhomes

corrections: Website corrected: recorded domain camping-les-restanques.com does not exist (no DNS); official site is camping-gorge-verdon.com.
Email corrected from info@camping-les-restanques.com to contact@campinglesrestanques83.com.
Phone corrected from +33 4 94 70 08 67 to +33 4 94 67 06 00.
records.notes: 3-star family campsite, 20-ha estate, ~3 km from Lac de Sainte-Croix. Coordinates from record kept (not contradicted; not officially published). Verified via search-indexed official-domain pages; direct fetch blocked by sandbox network policy.

records.originalName: Camping Rives du Lac de Sainte-Croix
records.officialName: Camping Tikayan Rives du Lac de Sainte Croix
records.address: Quartier Notre Dame, Chemin de la Blache, RD 71, 83630 Bauduen, France

touringPitchEvidence.summary: Official Tikayan pages describe stays in tent, caravan or motorhome on an 11-ha shaded site with motorhome emptying area; beach reachable via 300 m footpath.
touringPitchEvidence.quote: During your stay in tent, caravan or motorhome in the Verdon

corrections: Website corrected: recorded domain camping-rivesdulac.com does not exist (no DNS); campsite is operated by the Tikayan chain, official page on tikayan.com.
Email corrected from info@camping-rivesdulac.com to contact@camping-lac-sainte-croix.fr.
Phone corrected from +33 4 94 70 08 08 to +33 4 94 70 05 44.
records.notes: 3-star campsite ~300 m from Lac de Sainte-Croix. Coordinates from record kept (consistent with published address; not officially published as GPS). Verified via search-indexed official-domain pages; direct fetch blocked by sandbox network policy.

records.address: La Kabylie, Côte Ouest, 34450 Vias-Plage, France

touringPitchEvidence.summary: Official site has a dedicated page for touring pitches of 80–100 m² for tents, caravans and motorhomes; 172 pitches total, 450 m from the beach.
touringPitchEvidence.quote: Camping pitches Vias : Pitches for tents, caravans, motorhomes

corrections: Official name is 'Camping Paradis Le Cayola' (Camping Paradis network, 4 stars).
Phone corrected from +33 4 67 21 66 66 to +33 4 67 90 01 85 (published reception number).
Email corrected from info@campingcayola.fr to campingcayola@orange.fr (address published on the official site).
records.notes: Recorded website URL was correct. A 'camping dernière minute' (last-minute) page exists, suggesting short-notice bookings are normal, but same-day/walk-in policy is not explicitly published. Coordinates from record kept (not officially published; not verifiable here). Verified via search-indexed official-domain pages; direct fetch blocked by sandbox network policy.

touringPitchEvidence.summary: Official site rents touring pitches (e.g. 'Beach Farret' pitch category); 5-star beachfront campsite with pitches and rentals.
touringPitchEvidence.quote: Beach Farret pitches rental in Vias Plage

corrections: Website corrected: official site is camping-farret.com (recorded farret.com resolves and is the campsite's e-mail domain, but the published site is camping-farret.com).
Official name is 'Yelloh! Village Le Club Farret' (Yelloh! Village network).
records.notes: Recorded email and phone confirmed verbatim by the official brochure PDF hosted on camping-farret.com: 'LE CLUB FARRET 34450 VIAS-PLAGE info@farret.com • +33 (0)467 21 64 45'. Verified via search-indexed official-domain pages; direct fetch blocked by sandbox network policy.

touringPitchEvidence.summary: Official site states the 5-star campsite has 400 camping-caravanning pitches in addition to rental accommodation.

corrections: Website corrected: recorded camping-les-mimosas.com is a parked 'Domain Default page' with no content; the official site is mimosas.com.
Email corrected from contact@campinglesmimosas.com to mimosas@mimosas.com.
Phone corrected from +33 4 67 90 90 55 to +33 4 67 90 92 92.
records.notes: Do not confuse with same-named campsites elsewhere (e.g. Narbonne). Coordinates from record kept (not contradicted; not officially published). Verified via search-indexed official-domain pages; direct fetch blocked by sandbox network policy.

records.address: 34140 Mèze, France (shore of the Étang de Thau)

touringPitchEvidence.summary: Official site sells ~80 m² touring pitches for tents, caravans and camping-cars with electricity, e.g. the 'Grand Confort' pitch product page.

policies.minimumStay: Not published for pitches on accessible pages.
policies.receptionHours: Pitch check-in from 14:00, departure by 12:00 (FAQ); full reception hours not readable.

corrections: Campsite now operated within the Ciela Village / Koawa group.
Email corrected from contact@camping-beaurivage.fr to beau-rivage@koawa.com (published on official contact page).
Phone corrected from +33 4 67 43 81 58 to +33 4 66 60 07 00 (published on official contact page; group booking line).
records.notes: Recorded website URL was correct. FAQ: outside July/August late checkout possible for a fee (8 EUR pitches). Exact street address not readable on accessible pages. Coordinates from record kept. Verified via search-indexed official-domain pages; direct fetch blocked by sandbox network policy.

records.address: RD114, Route de Collioure, 66700 Argelès-sur-Mer, France

touringPitchEvidence.summary: Official prices page: pitch prices include the pitch, one car and one or two people; pitches for tents, caravans and camping-cars (242 pitches, 5 stars, clifftop above coves).

policies.minimumStay: Not published on accessible pages (see general booking conditions page).
policies.receptionHours: Phone contact Mon–Fri 09:00–16:00 (contact page); on-site reception hours not readable.

corrections: Phone corrected from +33 4 68 81 05 42 to +33 4 68 81 12 73.
Email corrected from contact@lescriques.com to contactcdp@lescriques.com.
records.notes: lescriques.co.uk is the campsite's own English-language site (same establishment as lescriques.com; source URLs use the indexed .co.uk pages). Pitch price includes only ONE car — an additional small car is likely a paid extra; confirm when contacting. Coordinates from record kept. Verified via search-indexed official-domain pages; direct fetch blocked by sandbox network policy.

touringPitchEvidence.summary: Official site has a dedicated touring-pitches page: pitches for tents and motorhomes for up to 6 people with electricity connections.
touringPitchEvidence.quote: Our campsite pitches in Argelès-sur-Mer | Camping La Chapelle

corrections: Website corrected: recorded domain camping-lachapelle.com does not exist (no DNS); official site is camping-la-chapelle.com (Marvilla Parks).
Phone corrected from +33 4 68 81 03 83 to +33 9 77 55 52 58 (published on official contact page).
Recorded email contact@camping-lachapelle.com is invalid (dead domain); no e-mail address published on accessible official pages — contact is via phone or the website contact form.
records.notes: 5-star campsite opposite the Argelès-sur-Mer tourist office, near the beach. E-mail unknown — the app's e-mail action should stay locked for this record; use phone/contact form. Coordinates from record kept. Verified via search-indexed official-domain pages; direct fetch blocked by sandbox network policy.

records.address: Avenue de la Retirada 1939, 66700 Argelès-sur-Mer, France

touringPitchEvidence.summary: Official pitches page: classic (60–80 m², tents only), comfort (90 m² for tents, caravans or campers, electricity included) and luxury pitches with water/electricity/drainage; RV service area on site.

corrections: Website corrected: official site is lesmarsouins.cielavillage.fr (Ciela Village); recorded camping-les-marsouins.com resolves but is not the published official site.
Email corrected from contact@camping-les-marsouins.com to lesmarsouins@cielavillage.com.
records.notes: Recorded phone matches the official site. 5-star campsite 800 m from the beach. Note: 'Classic' pitches are tents-only — the camper needs a comfort/luxury pitch. Coordinates from record kept. Verified via search-indexed official-domain pages; direct fetch blocked by sandbox network policy.

touringPitchEvidence.summary: Official 'Parcelas' page: shaded hedge-delimited pitches for up to 6 people including car/motorcycle plus caravan, tent or motorhome, with electricity; dedicated 'parcela de paso' transit pitches for passing motorhomes.

policies.minimumStay: No minimum published; dedicated one-night transit pitches ('parcela de paso') exist for motorhomes: check-in from 20:00, departure before 10:00.

corrections: Website corrected: official site is penamontanesa.com (recorded campingpenamontanesa.com resolves but is not the published official site).
Email corrected from info@campingpenamontanesa.com to info@penamontanesa.com (published on official site).
records.notes: Recorded phone matches official site (Tel. 974 500 032, Fax 974 500 991). Standard pitch includes ONE car — clarify extra-car fee when booking. 2 km from Aínsa, gateway to Ordesa; well positioned for the Sizigia route. Coordinates from record kept (consistent with published address). Verified via search-indexed official-domain pages; direct fetch blocked by sandbox network policy.

touringPitchEvidence.summary: No campsite named 'Camping Río Ara' could be verified in Fiscal. The recorded domain campingrioara.com does not exist (no DNS), so the recorded email and website are unusable. A campsite of that name exists in Torla-Ordesa (~15 km away), but the recorded coordinates and phone prefix point to Fiscal, where the actual campsite is 'Camping Ribera del Ara'.

corrections: Recorded website campingrioara.com: domain does not exist (no DNS resolution).
Recorded email info@campingrioara.com: unusable (dead domain).
Recorded phone +34 974 503 020 could not be confirmed for any campsite; the Fiscal campsite's published number is +34 974 503 035.
records.notes: Record appears to be a garbled reference to Camping Ribera del Ara in Fiscal (same location, near-identical phone number). Replaced with that campsite, verified below. Direct fetch blocked by sandbox network policy; verification via search-indexed official-domain pages.

replacement.address: Ctra. Nacional N-260 km 464,2, 22373 Fiscal (Huesca), Spain

touringPitchEvidence.summary: Official site: the campsite offers parcelas (touring pitches) with electric hookups for caravans, alongside bungalows, bengalis and mobile homes; sanitary blocks with hot water.
touringPitchEvidence.quote: dispone de Parcelas, Bungalows, Bengalis y Mobil Homes

replacement.notes: On the N-260 between Boltaña and Broto, on the river Ara — fits the Fiscal corridor toward Ordesa. No e-mail published on accessible pages (contact via phone or website; online booking link on the 'enlaces' page) — keep e-mail action locked. Coordinates not officially published; set from map before use (campsite is at N-260 km 464.2 by Fiscal, close to the recorded 42.4914,-0.1203).

requiresCorrections: Camping Rives du Lac de Sainte-Croix
